mapper.insert:
/* 미등록 자료 CODE 조회 */ SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CN_SERIAL AS INTEGER)), 0)+1 AS cnSerial, 'VIDEO_' || TO_CHAR(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CN_SERIAL AS INTEGER)), 0)+1) AS videoNo FROM DOCS_VIDEO
/* DOCS_VIDEO 추가 */ INSERT INTO DOCS_VIDEO ( OBJECT_ID, CN_SERIAL, INSERT_DT, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, VIDEO_NO, VIDEO_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, PROTECT_YN, INSERT_USER_NM, CURRENT_PAGE_NO, TOTAL_PAGE_NO, REV_NO, STATUS_CD) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{cnSerial}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{sessionUser.businessAreaCd}, #{businessTypeCd}, #{videoNo}, #{fileNm}, #{distributeTypeCd}, #{filePath}, #{orgFileNm}, #{fileNm}, #{fileSize}, #{protectYn}, #{sessionUser.userNm}, #{currentPageNo}, #{totalPageNo}, #{revNo}, #{statusCd})
